title: Mergen Governor decision
description: The Governor's classification of a task: the tier and the ceremony it sets. Auditable because the matched triggers are recorded, not just the label.

triggers_matched.description: High-trust triggers that fired. Non-empty implies tier is high-trust.

policy_results.description: Optional per-policy audit trail. One entry per floor guard evaluated, in the same {policy_id, result, reason} shape that verification-report.json uses, so the Governor and the verifier share one policy vocabulary. A guard that matched the change reports result 'fail' (a non-downgradable high-trust escalation, the policy-engine sense of a deny rule firing); a guard that did not match reports 'pass'.
